content.description:
Markdown mode for CodeMirror. Provides syntax highlighting for markdown including headers, emphasis, code blocks, lists, links, and task lists.

## Source

Minified from [jsDelivr](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/markdown/markdown.js).

## Features

- Header highlighting (# through ######)
- Emphasis (*italic*, **bold**, ~~strikethrough~~)
- Code blocks (fenced and indented)
- Lists (ordered, unordered, task lists)
- Links and images
- Blockquotes
- HTML passthrough

## Dependencies

Requires [codemirror](item://ad3bddac-95ce-41ae-aa11-6f6e6f537bc6) to be loaded first.
